hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"A pull request was just created via the GitHub MCP. Per this project PR-review autofix policy (CLAUDE.md): (1) immediately call subscribe_pr_activity for the new PR number; (2) start a bounded ~5-minute watch of this PR now -- re-check its Codex reviews and CI on a short interval (about 60-90 seconds) so the first review is caught even if no webhook wakes the session; (3) on each review, judge each comment against the code, then auto-apply confident small in-scope fixes by commit and push, ask via AskUserQuestion if a comment is ambiguous or architecturally significant, and skip silently if no action is needed; (4) after any fix you push, re-arm another ~5-minute watch because Codex re-reviews the new commit; (5) keep watching until the PR is merged or closed and report when it is green and review-addressed (merge-ready), leaving the actual merge to explicit user direction. Beyond the bounded window rely on webhook events; do not sleep-poll indefinitely."}}'
